description: Provision a Tier 1 (custodial) wallet for the authenticated user on a given chain. The PDS generates the key, encrypts it at rest, and links the public address to the caller's DID.

label.description: Optional human-readable label, 1-64 chars, unique per user.

errors.name: UnsupportedChain
errors.description: Chain must be ethereum or solana.

errors.name: ProvisionFailed
errors.description: Address collision, label conflict, or other linking failure.
